hero.title: Services that ship excellence
hero.description: We're a luxury technology practice for entrepreneurs and early-stage startups who refuse to compromise on quality. We don't just build features - we craft experiences that make people's lives better, products that scale gracefully, and brands that resonate deeply.
hero.antiposition: If you're looking for cheap and fast, we're not for you. If you're looking for exceptional work from people who care as much as you do, let's talk.

pricing.title: Pricing philosophy
pricing.description: We're not cheap. We're expensive for a reason - we deliver work that lasts, teams that care, and products that win.
pricing.note: Every project is different. These ranges give you a sense, but we'll provide detailed proposals based on your specific needs.

cta.title: Let's build something exceptional
cta.description: Ready to create something you'll be proud of? Let's talk.
steps: Schedule a call - No pressure conversation about your needs (30 mins)
Discovery session - If we're aligned, we'll dig deeper (1-2 weeks)
Proposal - Detailed scope, timeline, and investment
Partnership - If you love it, we start building together

hero.title: AI products that ship.
hero.description: Ponti Studios designs and engineers products, workflows, and internal systems for teams that need measurable outcomes, not demos.

services.label: Services
services.title: Services that ship excellence.
services.subtitle: We're a luxury technology practice for entrepreneurs and early-stage startups who refuse to compromise on quality.

projects.label: Selected work
projects.title: Proof in production.
projects.subtitle: Real outcomes for real teams. Not prototypes — shipped systems with measurable results.

items.name: Lumina Industries
items.blurb: Built a semantic + lexical search engine with unified ranking across keywords, semantic relatedness, recency, and engagement. Also hardened critical flows, reduced payloads, and shipped a student performance dashboard with cohort benchmarking and Resume Learning paths.

items.name: Revrock
items.blurb: Built an end-to-end platform for independent musicians with intelligent route planning, financial dashboards, automated venue discovery, and Spotify-powered audience insights.

items.name: StreamYard
items.blurb: Drove end-to-end development of consumer Teams and enterprise Business plans with role-based access control and collaboration features that unlocked $15M+ in new ARR and 13% consumer user growth. Built a two-sided creator marketplace serving 20K+ monthly active users with vector recommendations and generative AI conversation starters, driving a 40% lift in engagement and 300% YoY creator collaboration growth.

items.name: Prolog
items.blurb: Led engineering of a web application for producer submission triage, including an LLM-powered email parser for automated data extraction and vector-based similarity search for rapid candidate evaluation.

items.name: Whistle
items.blurb: Managed product, design, and engineering for a privacy-focused video conferencing platform tailored for movement-based education, helping a prestigious NYC ballet school keep operating during COVID-19.

items.name: Humana
items.blurb: Led mobile, voice, and chat engineering for holistic senior healthcare solutions and conducted user research to keep roadmap decisions tightly value-driven.

items.name: Kensho
items.blurb: Led architecture transformation from a proprietary ETL platform to a modern data stack using AWS S3, Spark, and Airflow, reducing processing time and maintenance overhead while leading a 15-engineer team across two locations.

items.name: Mimecast
items.blurb: Led web application development for an enterprise email and security management product, including a scalable white-label styling system and an internationalization / translation library.

items.name: Thomson Reuters
items.blurb: Designed and engineered a global application deployment, management, and monitoring platform, with fine-grained RBAC, personalized dashboards for decision-making, and monthly technical debt and code review sessions to raise team quality.

items.name: Glow Digital
items.blurb: Contributed to a web application for creating and auto-optimizing social ad campaigns, cutting third-party API usage by 90% and automating repetitive data entry to save users several hours per week.

items.name: Sherpa
items.blurb: AI-powered task management and personal operating system.

items.name: Kernel
items.blurb: AI harness engine for tools, skills, commands, and model orchestration.

items.name: Void
items.blurb: Semantic intelligence engine for document analysis and embeddings.

items.title: Clarity over hype
items.description: Say the hard thing plainly. Reduce noise, surface the decision, and make the next step obvious.

items.title: Systems over features
items.description: Design the working whole, not isolated wins. The product should stay coherent as it grows.

items.title: Taste over noise
items.description: Favor restraint, proportion, and sharp language over clutter. The interface should feel composed.

items.title: Execution over decks
items.description: Ship the thing. Reduce ceremony, close the loop, and learn from real use.

items.title: Operating mode
items.description: Small team. High standard. End-to-end. No sprawl, no theater.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Ready to build something real?
